title: Define Check Box Properties (Character Mode)
text: Define Check Box Properties (Character Mode) Define the properties for this check box widget when it appears in character mode. For information on check boxes, see ucheckbox (CheckBox) . Properties Tri-State Use Detail Trigger Decoration How to Setting Widget Properties Related Links Widgets and Character Mode If you create components that are intended for use in a character mode environment, be economical with the amount of text you display in each label and widget.
